export const isNotEmpty=str=>Boolean(str&&str.trim().length);export const isValidMobile=mobile=>{const mobileRegex=/^[6-9]\d{9}$/;// Indian mobile number format
return mobileRegex.test(mobile);};export const isValidEmail=email=>{const emailRegex=/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;return emailRegex.test(email);};
